name: Cajun Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Ground meat (veal, pork, and beef)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a nonstick 12-inch skillet, melt margarine or butter over medium heat.
2. Add carrots, onion, celery, and green pepper; cook until vegetables are tender, about 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
4. Set aside to cool slightly.
5. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. In a large bowl, mix ground meat, eggs, bread crumbs, milk, Worcestershire sauce, salt, cumin, black pepper, thyme, nutmeg, cayenne pepper, and cooked vegetable mixture until just combined but not over mixed.
7. Shape the meat mixture into a 10x5 inch loaf in a 13x9 baking pan.
8. Brush remaining catsup over the top of the loaf.
9. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
10. Let the meat loaf stand for 10 minutes before slicing.
11. Garnish with herbs.
